shared_rules.hatch_consistency: Use the official Hatch mascot reference as the source of truth.

assets.hatch_variant: pointing narrator integrated into story scene
assets.alt: Hatch mascot beside the Pinterest Save button, with connecting lines showing the button embedded across multiple websites.
assets.caption: Hatch mascot beside the Pinterest Save button, with connecting lines showing the button embedded across multiple websites.
assets.prompt: Pinterest Save Button | hero: Hatch mascot (the HackProduct robot with graduation cap and growth arrow) standing beside a large embeddable button widget on a cream background. The button reads "Save" and has a small pin icon. Behind Hatch, faint lines connect the button to multiple website thumbnails, suggesting distributed reach. Hatch's expression is pleased, cap settled. Watermark: "HackProduct" wordmark bottom-right, 60% opacity, JetBrains Mono. Aspect 2400x1350. Use case: illustration-story. Use the official Hatch mascot as a strict character reference, not as a pasted sticker. Preserve Hatch's rounded green head frame, cream face/body, graduation cap, growth arrow, H chest mark, bright eyes, mitten hands, and friendly coach expression. No exact logos, no fake screenshots, no real person likenesses, no implied company endorsement. Do not include a watermark in the generated source because watermarking is applied after approval.
assets.crop_notes: Center-cover crop checked against role safe zone.
qa: Official Hatch reference required by prompt and manifest.
Watermark applied in post-processing.
No exact logos, fake screenshots, real person likenesses, or implied endorsement.

assets.prompt: Pinterest Save Button | failure-mechanism: Hatch in thinking pose, looking at a simple flow diagram: Website image → Pin It click → Pinterest board → follower sees → publisher traffic.
